info.description: Backend billing, package & voucher API for a FreeRADIUS/Mikrotik hotspot. Provisions credentials via the radius-api and accepts payments via Xendit, Midtrans and Tripay.
info.title: Billing Hotspot API

get.summary: Get a batch with its vouchers

delete.summary: Delete a batch and its vouchers

post.summary: Register or update a NAS / RADIUS client
Confirm cash payment for an order (issues the voucher)
Manually settle a gateway order (webhook failed / payment page closed)
Create an order and start payment (public)

parameters.description: Storefront URL the 'Beli Paket' button opens
parameters.name: store

get.summary: Check an order's status by order number (public)
Get an active package by slug (public)
Public storefront settings + available payment methods
Export orders in a date window as CSV
Revenue report for a date window

channel.description: Channel is optional and provider-specific (e.g. Tripay "QRIS","BRIVA").

data_quota_mb.description: DataQuotaMB caps total transfer in megabytes (0 = unlimited).

highlight.description: Presentation / merchandising for the package-selection UI.

profile.description: Radius profile name (FreeRADIUS group). Derived from slug.

rate_down_kbps.description: Bandwidth (kbps). RateUp = client upload, RateDown = client download.

session_timeout_secs.description: SessionTimeoutSecs caps total online time (0 = unlimited).

simultaneous_use.description: SimultaneousUse caps concurrent logins for one voucher.

validity_value.description: Validity window, e.g. 1 day. Combined into ValidityUnit/Value.

vouchers.description:
Voucher.BatchID is non-conventional (GORM would expect VoucherBatchID),
so the foreign key is declared explicitly.
